name: glow
description: Glow is an easy-to-use distributed computation system written in Go, similar to Hadoop Map Reduce, Spark, Flink, Storm, etc. I am also working on another similar pure Go system, https://github.com/chrislusf/gleam , which is more flexible and more performant.
description_ja: Glow は Go で書かれた使いやすい分散計算システムで、Hadoop Map Reduce、Spark、Flink、Storm 等に類似している。より柔軟で高性能な純粋 Go 製の類似システム gleam も開発中
